sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75534" key="o(siwth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁσι-ωτήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n75534.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">consecrator,</tr_> the name given at Delphi to <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the victim offered when one of the priests called</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὅσιοι</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">was appointed,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.292d</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
